mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, review_type, biz_id, title, status, reject_reason, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_reviews (supplier_id, review_type, biz_id, title, status, reject_reason, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reviewType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rejectReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_reviews (supplier_id, review_type, biz_id, title, status, reject_reason, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.reviewType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bizId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.rejectReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_reviews WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM supplier_reviews WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_reviews SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE supplier_reviews SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
